name: Hillary Clinton
subject: Thank you, South Carolina! (And thank you, too)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by hundreds of thousands of grassroots donors
body:
You should be so proud of this victory. | Friend --

We just won the South Carolina primary!!

I am so grateful to you. Some may have doubted us, but we never doubted each other.

After today’s victory, I know we’re ready to fight even harder these final three days before Super Tuesday. With more than a dozen contests and more than 800 delegates at stake, this will be our toughest test yet.

**[If you’re with me, chip in $1 right now, and let’s go win this nomination.](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjQ4MzY0NzYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQ0Njc3ODM5S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

This is your campaign. And I know you’re getting involved to do more than just help yourself or your family. More than 800,000 of you are giving your time and chipping in what you can because you believe that every child in this country should have a great education and every family should feel at home in our country -- no matter their race or religion.

Meanwhile, any of the Republican candidates -- especially their frontrunner -- would write discrimination into our laws, roll back women’s rights, and return us to the tax cuts for the rich that left the middle class in the cold and brought our country to the brink of another Great Depression.

I’m not going to let them drag us backward -- and I know you won’t, either. We’re going to break down every barrier that holds you back, and we’re going to build ladders of opportunity in their place, so every American can go as far as your hard work can take you.

**The future we want is within our grasp. We took a big step forward today, and we’ll go even further on Super Tuesday. I'm so grateful to have you with me on this journey. Chip in $1 now, and let’s make history together:**
[ | | [**Donate $1**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjQ4MzY0NzYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzQ0Njc3ODM5S0&mt=1&rt=0)

Thank you,

Hillary

name: Rick Renshaw, McConnell for Senate
subject: It’s game time. Can you help us?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Jonathan McConnell
body:
| Friend -- Election Day is TUESDAY, and [**we need all hands on deck if we’re going to win this thing**](http://www.mcconnell2016.com/volunteer?e=92249b206344e4c5e978546dc4ae2bbd&utm_source=mcconnell&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20160227_vol&n=1) and elect Jonathan McConnell as our next U.S. Senator. The stakes in this election couldn’t be higher, and the Establishment has done everything they can to stack the deck against us. But momentum is on our side, and if we all work together we can -- and will -- win on Tuesday. I won’t sugar coat it: this is an all-hands-on-deck effort. We need volunteers between now and Tuesday who can make phone calls, talk with their neighbors, and stand strong for our campaign at top polling places on Election Day. Anything you can do -- calling voters, waving signs, or just texting a friend and reminding them to vote -- will help more than you know. No contribution is too small. [ **Friend, can you help?** ](http://www.mcconnell2016.com/volunteer?e=92249b206344e4c5e978546dc4ae2bbd&utm_source=mcconnell&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20160227_vol&n=2) We’ve got leaders working in every community who can help coordinate with you to get things done, but they can’t do it alone. We need our strongest supporters -- yes, you -- to help us in this final push to show that the grassroots can beat back the Establishment machine. Are you in? Sign up now: **[http://www.mcconnell2016.com/volunteer](http://www.mcconnell2016.com/volunteer?e=92249b206344e4c5e978546dc4ae2bbd&utm_source=mcconnell&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20160227_vol&n=3)** Rick Renshaw
Campaign Manager

---
Paid for by Friends of Jonathan McConnell

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). This campaign is powered by conservatives like you, so if you have any thoughts on anything at all, [click here](http://www.mcconnell2016.com/contact?e=92249b206344e4c5e978546dc4ae2bbd&utm_source=mcconnell&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20160227_vol&n=4) and let us know. We believe that email is one of the best ways to stay in touch with our supporters, but you can [click here if you would like to unsubscribe](http://www.mcconnell2016.com/unsubscribe?e=92249b206344e4c5e978546dc4ae2bbd&utm_source=mcconnell&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20160227_vol&n=5) from these messages.

If you’re not interested in continuing to receive email updates, there are other ways to stay involved. You can follow our campaign on [Facebook](http://www.mcconnell2016.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Ffacebook.com%2FMcConnell2016&e=92249b206344e4c5e978546dc4ae2bbd&utm_source=mcconnell&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20160227_vol&n=6) or [Twitter](http://www.mcconnell2016.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2Fmcconnell2016&e=92249b206344e4c5e978546dc4ae2bbd&utm_source=mcconnell&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20160227_vol&n=7).

**Thank you so much for everything you’re doing to help take on and defeat the Washington Establishment.**

Friends of Jonathan McConnell, 2127 14th Ave S, Birmingham, AL 35205, United States.

name: Rand Paul
subject: Just look at this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate
body:
Dear Patriot:

I know you've heard this one before.
"There's just nothing left to cut from the
budget."
We've heard it from the left and from the
right. The Washington Machine really wants you to think they
can't make spending cuts.
But there's only one reason they can't and
that's because they want to keep spending oblivion.
Just look at the videos I made to detail just
some of the gratuitous waste in Washington and you'll know the
next politician that says "no" to spending cuts is saying "yes"
to wasting your money.

This has got to stop!
Every year that I've been in the Senate I've
drafted an annual Waste Report that details the misuses of
taxpayer funds like this and let me tell you, I've found A LOT
more.
There are a million places to cut millions in
spending.
Earlier this week I asked the Senate Budget
Committee to consider including the proposed cuts from the Waste
Report in the FY 2017 budget and I need your help urging them to
do so.
Here are just a few more examples of waste
that deserves to be cut from the budget:

$6 million campaign to promote tourism in
Albania

$43 million gas station in Afghanistan

$15 million grant to allow a golf club
maker to do research in space

$50,000 Christmas tree television ads

$15.6 million grant to cover foreign
students' college tuition

$175 million study on sleep apnea riddled
with fraud

$450,000 grant to produce climate change
video games

$25,000 laundromat for the U.S. Forest
Service

$100,00 flower show for the National Park
Service

$380,000 study to investigate the
"Freshman 15″

$218,000 campaign to sterilize feral
coyotes and invasive burros

$15,000 grant for a conference on
balding" (The Blaze, 12/21/15)

Really, Patriot, can you believe they want
you to pay for this stuff?
I can't.
I will continue to fight for fiscal
responsibility in the Senate not only because it's the right
thing to do, but because it's the only thing we can do to save
this country from the point of unrecoverable debt.
We cannot continue spending as usual. It is
just not sustainable.
It's time for a balanced budget. It's time to
put an end to this waste.
Stand with me today to urge the Budget
Committee to implement these cuts.

In Liberty,
Rand Paul

Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: (not the billionaires)
body:
#
Sisters and Brothers -
At the bottom of our website and every email we've sent since the start of this campaign it says "Paid for by Bernie 2016." And beneath those words, "(not the billionaires)."
That's because when we started this campaign we were polling at 3 percent, we had no organization, no money, and we were taking on the most powerful political organization in the United States.
Then a supporter from Chicago, Illinois made the first contribution to our campaign -- for $3. A few minutes later, $50 from a supporter in California, then $10 from someone in Georgia. Ten months and four million contributions later, working people have powered our political revolution further than anyone could have imagined.
But tomorrow we face one of our most important tests of the campaign: the final FEC fundraising deadline before Super Tuesday.
**[Make a $2.70 contribution to our campaign before tomorrow's critical deadline and we'll have the resources we need to win this primary, the White House, and take back our country from the billionaire class.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/not-the-billionaires?refcode=em160228v1-alt-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/not-the-billionaires?refcode=em160228v1-alt-full")**
Super Tuesday is in just two days. Then there are twelve more primaries and caucuses in the two weeks that follow -- a few in VERY LARGE, delegate-rich states. And Hillary Clinton's billionaire-funded super PAC is already spending obscene amounts of money.
This campaign is powered by people like you, "not the billionaires." That's why your contribution before tomorrow's deadline is so important.
In solidarity,
Jeff Weaver
Campaign Manager
Bernie 2016
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/not-the-billionaires?refcode=em160228v1-alt-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/not-the-billionaires?refcode=em160228v1-alt-full")**

name: Candy Carson
subject: Don't settle for empty promises...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carson America, Inc
body:
---
| | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/33844160:W2OrSECqN:m:1:876315805:704099966FD984F927D087127ED76FC9:r)
---

Peter,

There are many crises currently facing the nation and they will only continue to grow if we do not correct the current path that we are on. It is important that when the next president is sworn into office next January that we elect the BEST person to get us back on the right track.

I believe that my husband, Dr. Ben Carson, is that right person and let me tell you why.

Ben has the right temperament to be our next Commander in Chief according to several generals with decades of military service.

He has had more 2AM phone calls involving life and death decisions than any other candidate and has put together specialized teams to solve complex problems. During his time as a pediatric neurosurgeon, he made difficult life and death choices and assembled teams thousands upon thousands of times.

Poll after poll shows that Ben has the highest favorability rating of any candidate in the race and consistently beats Secretary Clinton in a general election.

My husband is not running for President to build his resume and he doesn't have political ties or commitments to anyone but We The People.

You do not have to settle for the empty promises of career politicians.

Super Tuesday is on March 1st and voters from twelve states will go to the polls. Those states are Alabama, Alaska, Arkansas, Georgia, Massachusetts, Minnesota, Oklahoma, Tennessee, Texas, Vermont, Virginia, and Wyoming.

If you live in one of those states, we hope that we can count on your vote and your dedication to helping others wake up to America's plight on Tuesday. Or if you have family and friends in one of the Super Tuesday states, please take a second and forward this message to them.

Thank you for your joining Ben in this fight to heal and revive the nation.

Bless you all,

Candy Carson

subject: The Latest

body:
[](www.JohnKasich.com)
**Memo:** Update from the Trail
**From:** Beth Hansen, Campaign Manager
We're looking forward to the next few weeks of contests as dozens of states will vote and caucus on March 1st, 8th and 15th. Poll after poll has shown that Gov. John Kasich is not only the best Republican candidate to defeat Hillary Clinton this fall, but in a head-to-head matchup with Trump in Ohio, Gov. Kasich would defeat him by 17 points. The pundits have been calling for the field to narrow and we agree that John Kasich is positioned best to defeat Trump. Those candidates who cannot win their home states should drop out immediately and support Gov. John Kasich.

**The Houston GOP Debate:**

Governor Kasich distinguished himself from the other candidates as the one person on stage who has produced results, not just rhetoric. Talking a big game is not enough. The American people demand action, and John Kasich has been delivering action his entire life. Gov. Kasich has shaken up the system and changed lives for the better time and time again. No other candidate can make that claim, and it showed.

[](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/33844335:WSQW5EC5N:m:1:958431888:857B8AFE22F86028EDCB0D0458EE310F:r)

**Major Endorsements:**

Gov. John Kasich's support continues to grow as more American's hear his positive message that focuses on job creation, finds common-sense solutions for our challenges and makes America safer & stronger. Just this past week, Gov. Kasich received endorsements from Idaho Gov. Butch Otter, Former U.S. Attorney General Alberto Gonzalez, Former U.S. Transportation Secretary Ray LaHood, Former PA Governor & U.S. Homeland Security Secretary Tom Ridge, Former MA Gov. Bill Weld, Former N.J. Gov. Christine Todd Whitman and many others. See a list at the bottom of this email.

**Our New TV Ad:**
"Progress," which began airing early last week, points to John Kasich's record of success as governor of Ohio: 400,000 new private sector jobs, the largest tax cut in the nation and fewer regulations slowing the growth of small businesses.

[](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/33844336:WSQW5EC5N:m:1:958431888:857B8AFE22F86028EDCB0D0458EE310F:r)

body:
| Friend,

Just yesterday, we overwhelmingly won the Maryland Young Democrats statewide straw poll and I spoke about the enormous importance of civic activism and the high stakes for this election.

On Friday, we hit our official two-month deadline before the primary, and things are in full swing. Polls show this race is in a dead heat. We know we can win, but with a Super PAC spending money against us - we have to be ready for anything.

That's why I need your help to fully fund our Rapid Response before the end of the month on Monday at midnight. It's critical we have all our resources in the door for the final stretch ahead. **[We need just 32 more people from 20906 to help.
